Itissalat Al-Maghrib S.A. announces Annual dividend, payable on June 01, 2026
Full_Content: Itissalat Al-Maghrib (IAM) S.A. announced Annual dividend of MAD 4.0000 per share payable on June 01, 2026, ex-date on May 21, 2026 and record date on May 20, 2026.

Title: Itissalat Al-Maghrib S.A. Reports Earnings Results for the Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
Full_Content: Itissalat Al-Maghrib (IAM) S.A. reported earnings results for the full year ended December 31, 2025. For the full year, the company reported sales was MAD 36,681 million compared to MAD 36,699 million a year ago. Net income was MAD 6,968 million compared to MAD 1,801 million a year ago.Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was MAD 7.93 compared to MAD 2.05 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was MAD 7.93 compared to MAD 2.05 a year ago.

Itissalat Al-Maghrib S.A. Reports Earnings Results for the Half Year Ended June 30, 2025
Full_Content: Itissalat Al-Maghrib (IAM) S.A. reported earnings results for the half year ended June 30, 2025. For the half year, the company reported sales was MAD 18,041 million compared to MAD 18,260 million a year ago. Net income was MAD 4,117 million compared to net loss of MAD 1,147 million a year ago.Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was MAD 4.68 compared to basic loss per share from continuing operations of MAD 1.3 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was MAD 4.68 compared to diluted loss per share from continuing operations of MAD 1.3 a year ago.
